title: Tangy Velvety Mexican Onion Stir-fry
description: A festive mexican dish featuring onion rings in a tangy sauce made with low-fat-friendly ingredients for a velvety texture and low-calorie meal.
instructions: Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
Add onion rings and sauté for about 5 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add chopped jalapenos, minced garlic, and sliced red bell peppers. Cook for about 3-4 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Pour in vegetable broth, lime juice, mayonnaise, vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine all ingredients into a tangy sauce.
Return the onion rings to skillet and stir-fry for another minute or two, allowing the onions to soak up the sauce until they reach your desired consistency and flavor profile.
Serve hot as an appetizer or side dish with lime wedges on the side.
